## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run build` succeeds
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated (if API changed)
- [ ] API client regenerated (if spec changed)
- [ ] Design system rules followed (white theme, no animations, sharp edges)
